query: I keep considering quiet plans before checks captures and threats
My undefended bishop was attacked and I lost it to a fork
I moved my queen repeatedly and fell behind in development
I delayed castling and allowed checks against my exposed king
I missed a capture that removed the defender and won material
I grabbed a pawn instead of developing minor pieces and castling
My king had no luft and was trapped by a back rank threat
An undefended rook became the target of a pin and skewer
Before moving I need a repeatable scan for checks captures and direct threats
One defender was protecting two pieces and could not do both jobs
I automatically recaptured and missed an in-between forcing move
How can I notice pieces with no defenders before choosing a move
My knight was defended once but attacked twice and I ignored it
My queen and rook lined up with my king and allowed a skewer
I need to bring out knights and bishops while making useful threats
I wasted opening tempi moving one developed piece again and again
I gave away the center before completing development
Opening lines near my own king made every enemy rook and queen dangerous
I weakened the pawns sheltering my castled king without a concrete reason
My king needed an escape square before the opponent used a mating net
